summary: M305 — Sets + uniques + affixes: 24 sets (12 low-tier 2-piece / 8 mid 3-piece / 4 endgame 4-5-piece), 24 uniques across 5 acts (boss-tied + open-world drops), 40 new affixes (elemental combo, conditional, defensive, resource, set helpers), 12 legendary effect hooks dispatched on combat-start/hit/crit/cast/kill. Set/unique tooltip + colored borders. Note: onTakeDamage hook deferred to next milestone for re-entrancy safety.
